member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AttachmentsController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for managing attachment metadata under projects.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AttachmentsController.GetProjectAttachments(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Common.AttachmentQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all attachments that belong to a specific project.
member.returns: All attachments under the specified project.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AttachmentsController.GetAttachment(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single attachment by its unique identifier.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AttachmentsController.CreateAttachment(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Attachments.CreateAttachmentDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates attachment metadata under a specific project.
member.param: The project ID that the attachment belongs to.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AttachmentsController.UpdateAttachment(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Attachments.UpdateAttachmentDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates editable metadata of an existing attachment.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AttachmentsController.UploadAttachment(System.Guid,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a physical file and stores attachment metadata under a project.
member.param: The project ID that the attachment belongs to.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AttachmentsController.DeleteAttachment(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an attachment by its unique identifier.
member.returns: An empty success response if the attachment was deleted.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Provides authentication endpoints for API users.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AuthController.Login(ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT bearer token.
member.returns: A JWT token and user summary.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AuthController.Register(ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new contractor account.
member.param: Registration details for the new contractor.
member.returns: A success response when registration is completed.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.AuthController.Me(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the currently authenticated user profile.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.MyTasksController
member.summary: Provides contractor self-service task endpoints for the current authenticated user.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.MyTasksController.GetMyTasks(ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Common.TaskItemQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all tasks assigned to the current contractor.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.MyTasksController.GetMyTask(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single assigned task that belongs to the current contractor.
member.returns: The assigned task detail if found.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.MyTasksController.UpdateMyTaskStatus(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskStatusDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the status of a task assigned to the current contractor.
member.returns: The updated task detail if found.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.ProjectController
member.summary: Provides CRUD endpoints for managing construction projects.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.ProjectController.GetProjects(ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Common.ProjectQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all projects in the system.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.ProjectController.GetProject(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single project by its unique identifier.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.ProjectController.CreateProject(ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.CreateProjectDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new project.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.ProjectController.UpdateProject(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.UpdateProjectDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates editable fields of an existing project.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.ProjectController.DeleteProject(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a project by its unique identifier.
member.returns: An empty success response if the project was deleted.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.ProjectController.DeleteAllProjects(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes all projects in the system. Related tasks, variations, attachments, and task assignments are deleted by cascade.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.TaskItemsController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for managing task items under projects.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.TaskItemsController.GetProjectTasks(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Common.TaskItemQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all tasks that belong to a specific project.
member.returns: All tasks under the specified project.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.TaskItemsController.GetTask(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single task by its unique identifier.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.TaskItemsController.CreateTask(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.CreateTaskItemDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new task under a specific project.
member.param: The project ID that the task belongs to.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.TaskItemsController.UpdateTask(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskItemDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates editable fields of an existing task.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.TaskItemsController.UpdateTaskStatus(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskStatusDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates only the status of a task.
member.param: The new status value. Allowed values: Todo, Doing, Done.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.TaskItemsController.SendTaskSms(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.SendTaskSmsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an SMS update to all active users assigned to a task.
member.param: Optional custom SMS body. If omitted, the backend sends a default task summary.
member.returns: A delivery summary including sent and skipped recipients.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.TaskItemsController.SendTaskEmail(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.SendTaskEmailDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an email update to all active users assigned to a task.
member.param: Optional custom email body. If omitted, the backend sends a default task summary.
member.returns: A delivery summary including sent and skipped recipients.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.UsersController
member.summary: Provides user management endpoints for administrative roles.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.UsersController.GetUsers(ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Common.UserQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets users for management and assignment workflows.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.UsersController.GetUser(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single user by identifier.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.UsersController.UpdateUser(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Users.UpdateUserDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates editable user profile fields.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.UsersController.UpdateUserRole(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Users.UpdateUserRoleDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Changes a user's role.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.UsersController.UpdateUserActive(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Users.UpdateUserActiveDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enables or disables a user account.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.VariationsController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for managing variations under projects.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.VariationsController.GetProjectVariations(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Common.VariationQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all variations that belong to a specific project.
member.returns: All variations under the specified project.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.VariationsController.GetVariation(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single variation by its unique identifier.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.VariationsController.CreateVariation(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Variations.CreateVariationDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new variation under a specific project.
member.param: The project ID that the variation belongs to.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.VariationsController.UpdateVariation(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Variations.UpdateVariationDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates editable fields of an existing variation.

member.name: M:ConstructionManagement.Controllers.VariationsController.UpdateVariationStatus(System.Guid,ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Variations.UpdateVariationStatusDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates only the status of a variation.
member.param: The new status value. Allowed values: Draft, Submitted, Approved, Rejected, NeedInfo.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Attachments.AttachmentListDto
member.summary: Summary attachment data returned by list endpoints.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Attachments.AttachmentDetailDto
member.summary: Detailed attachment data returned by single-item endpoints.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Attachments.CreateAttachmentDto
member.summary: Request body used to create a new attachment metadata record.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Attachments.CreateAttachmentDto.FileName
member.summary: Original file name shown to users.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Attachments.CreateAttachmentDto.FilePath
member.summary: Stored file path or storage key.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Attachments.CreateAttachmentDto.ContentType
member.summary: Optional MIME content type such as application/pdf or image/png.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Attachments.UpdateAttachmentDto
member.summary: Request body used to update attachment metadata.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.SendTaskEmailDto
member.summary: Request body used to send an email update for a task team.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.SendTaskEmailDto.Message
member.summary: Optional custom email message. If omitted, the backend builds a default task summary.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.TaskEmailResultDto
member.summary: Email sending summary returned after notifying assigned users.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.SendTaskSmsDto
member.summary: Request body used to send an SMS update for a task team.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.SendTaskSmsDto.Message
member.summary: Optional custom message. If omitted, the backend builds a default task summary.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.TaskSmsResultDto
member.summary: SMS sending summary returned after notifying assigned users.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.TaskSmsResultDto.TaskItemId
member.summary: Related task identifier.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.TaskSmsResultDto.TaskTitle
member.summary: Related task title.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.TaskSmsResultDto.AttemptedCount
member.summary: Number of recipients attempted.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.TaskSmsResultDto.SentCount
member.summary: Number of successfully accepted messages.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.TaskSmsResultDto.SkippedRecipients
member.summary: Users skipped because phone data was missing or invalid.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Notifications.TaskSmsResultDto.FailedRecipients
member.summary: Users that failed at provider level.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectListDto
member.summary: Summary project data returned by list endpoints.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectListDto.ProjectId
member.summary: Unique project identifier.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectListDto.Code
member.summary: Internal project code.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectListDto.Name
member.summary: Project name shown to users.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectListDto.Address
member.summary: Project site address or location.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectListDto.ClientName
member.summary: Customer or owner name.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectListDto.Status
member.summary: Project status.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectListDto.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the project was created.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto
member.summary: Detailed project data returned by single-item endpoints.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.ProjectId
member.summary: Unique project identifier.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.Code
member.summary: Internal project code.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.Name
member.summary: Project name shown to users.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.Address
member.summary: Project site address or location.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.Description
member.summary: Longer project summary.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.ClientName
member.summary: Customer or owner name.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.Status
member.summary: Project lifecycle status.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.Budget
member.summary: Approved budget value when available.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.StartDate
member.summary: Planned start date.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.EndDate
member.summary: Planned finish date.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.ProjectDetailDto.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the project was created.

member.summary: Request body used to create a new project.

member.summary: Internal project code.

member.summary: Project name shown in the system.

member.summary: Project site address or location.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.CreateProjectDto.Description
member.summary: Longer project summary.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.CreateProjectDto.ClientName
member.summary: Customer or owner name.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.CreateProjectDto.Status
member.summary: Current project status.

member.summary: Approved budget value when available.

member.summary: Planned start date.

member.summary: Planned finish date.

member.summary: Request body used to update an existing project.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.UpdateProjectDto.Code
member.summary: Updated internal project code.

member.summary: Updated project name.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.UpdateProjectDto.Budget
member.summary: Updated approved budget value.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.UpdateProjectDto.StartDate
member.summary: Updated planned start date.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Projects.UpdateProjectDto.EndDate

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto
member.summary: Summary task data returned by list endpoints.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.TaskItemId
member.summary: Unique task identifier.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.ProjectId
member.summary: Parent project identifier.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.Title
member.summary: Short title of the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.ProjectName
member.summary: Related project name.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.Description
member.summary: Optional detailed description of the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.Status
member.summary: Current task status.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.AssignedUserId
member.summary: Assigned worker identifier when the task is assigned.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.AssignedUserName
member.summary: Assigned worker display name when available.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.AssignedUserIds
member.summary: All assigned user IDs.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.AssignedUsers
member.summary: All assigned users for this task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.StartDate
member.summary: Planned start date for the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.DueDate
member.summary: Planned due date for the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemListDto.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the task was created.

member.summary: Detailed task data returned by single-item endpoints.

member.summary: Short title of the task.

member.summary: Optional detailed description of the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemDetailDto.Status
member.summary: Current task status.

member.summary: Planned due date for the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemDetailDto.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the task was created.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskItemDetailDto.Attachments
member.summary: Project attachments available to the worker for reference.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskAttachmentDto
member.summary: Attachment summary nested under task detail responses.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.TaskAssigneeDto
member.summary: Minimal assignee summary nested under task responses.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.CreateTaskItemDto
member.summary: Request body used to create a new task item.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.CreateTaskItemDto.Title
member.summary: Short title of the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.CreateTaskItemDto.Description
member.summary: Optional detailed description of the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.CreateTaskItemDto.StartDate
member.summary: Planned start date for the task. If omitted, the backend uses the current UTC time.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.CreateTaskItemDto.DueDate
member.summary: Planned due date for the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.CreateTaskItemDto.AssignedUserId
member.summary: Optional contractor user ID assigned to the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.CreateTaskItemDto.AssignedUserIds
member.summary: Optional list of assigned user IDs for collaborative work.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskStatusDto
member.summary: Request body used to update task status.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskStatusDto.Status
member.summary: New task status. Allowed values: Todo, Doing, Done.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskItemDto
member.summary: Request body used to update an existing task item.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskItemDto.Title
member.summary: Updated short title of the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskItemDto.Description
member.summary: Updated detailed description of the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskItemDto.StartDate
member.summary: Updated planned start date for the task. If omitted, the backend keeps the existing start date.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskItemDto.DueDate
member.summary: Updated due date for the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskItemDto.AssignedUserId
member.summary: Optional contractor user ID assigned to the task.

member.name: P:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Tasks.UpdateTaskItemDto.AssignedUserIds
member.summary: Optional list of assigned user IDs for collaborative work.

member.summary: Summary user data returned by user list endpoints.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Users.UserDetailDto
member.summary: Detailed user data returned by user detail endpoints.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Users.UpdateUserDto
member.summary: Request body used to update editable user profile fields.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Users.UpdateUserRoleDto
member.summary: Request body used to change a user's role.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Users.UpdateUserActiveDto
member.summary: Request body used to enable or disable a user.

member.summary: Optional detailed description of the variation.

member.summary: Request body used to update variation status.

member.name: T:ConstructionManagement.DTOs.Variations.UpdateVariationDto
member.summary: Request body used to update an existing variation.
